changes.commit: --custom 3d node
**Graph Panel] Add shift for selecting all junction in junction group. - [Graph Panel**: Improve junction group visibility.
**VectorBox**: Add button for adding new vector to an vector array
**Randomizer**: While opening the dialog, a new "Add to Randomizer" button will shows up in the Inspector panel for faster workflow.
**Blend**: Add boolean for swapping background and foreground.
Fix crash when deleting node with feedback loop to itself.
Remove ShaderToy nodes from custom node folder. (For old user, the custom folder is located at $AppData%\Local\PixelComposer\Nodes\Custom)
Overwrite default now won't overwrite custom preset.
**Sort Array Group**: Fix duplicated render path on rendering.
**ScrollBox**: Closing scroll dialog now returns focus to the calling dialog, panel.
**Inspector/Graph Panel**: Filter animation now also highlight all animating node in graph panel.
**MK Flare**: Add randomize flare button.
**Inspector Panel**: Sections and custom widgets will be hidden when using filter.
**Graph Panel**: Fix adding node from pie menu does not trigger node chord.
**Loop**: Fix broken connection when deleting input/output node.
**Animation Panel**: Fix dragging whole animation not update the node.
Introduced
**Graph Panel**: Fix full view doesn't take compact metadata area into account.
**Offset**: Add offset angle control.
**Replace Image**: Add alpha culling.
**Fill Path**: Fix alpha not applying.
Hotkey that assigns to multiple action now create pie menu (can be disable in preference).
**Preview Panel**: Add vertical toolbar mode.
**Bridge Path**: Add path controls.
**Scatter**: Add point editing tool in points array mode.
**Pin**: Fix selection drawn as solid circle.
**RM Primitive] Add specular property. - [RM Render**: Add light color, intensity properties.
Introduced
**Particle**: Node will now automatically render the all the missing frames to improve smoothness when scrubbing or editing value.
**Graph Panel**: Fix crash when trying to blend nodes with no surface output.
**Bridge/ Map path**: Add support for multiple non-composite paths.
- mk blast base
**Graph Panel**: Add quick connect from connection line to junction.
**Inspector Panel**: Collapsing section will keep scroll position until manual scrolling.
Fix cli mode unusable.
Loading Collection now set initial value as default.
**Canvas**: Fix color picker always pick brush color.
--add preview_hotkey node based prop
Add project migration tool to highlight properties that changed and could have impact to the project when loading project made in older version.
**Graph Panel**: Fix adding node not auto connect.
**Graph Panel**: Fix quick connect returns error when hovering on inline group.
**SmokeSim > Render Domain**: Add volume color and density remap.
**Graph Panel**: Fix node wrangler select incorrect input.
**Tunnel**: Fix tunnel not connect when setting scope to group in global context.
**Tunnel**: Fix tunnel not connect when setting scope to group in global context.
**Graph Panel**: Add project settings in topbar.
**Graph Panel**: Add shift+ctrl when using quick connect to allow overriding already connected junction.
**Locale**: Remove comments and duplicated entries in words.json
**Preview Panel**: Add Alt+Shift quick nav.
**Graph Panel**: Fix node add from related menu not connect to the calling junction.
**Deserialize**: Fix error when checking surface depth.
**Inline Group**: Add dragging support.
**Value**: Fix setting default not apply in the same session.
**MK Parallax**: Add depth properties.
**Group Input**: Fix error when using internal surface asset.
**Dither**: Add invert dither pattern settings.
